/A outputs to initialDASet. Parameters: base - base address to which to I/O card is set initialDASet - the value to set all D/A channels with. Method Detail daSet public void daSet (int channel, int value) Set the D/A channel. Param

int value) Set the D/A channel. Parameters: channel - the D/A channel to set. Must be from 1 to 6 inclusive. If channel is outside this range, this does nothing. value - the 12-bit value to output, in the range 0 to 0x

- the 12-bit value to output, in the range 0 to 0x0fff. Values outside this range will be clipped to this range. See Also: lastDASet(int) lastDASet public int lastDASet (int channel) Get the last value sent to the D/A by daSet(). Pa

Get the last value sent to the D/A by daSet(). Parameters: channel - the D/A channel to query. Must be from 1 to 6 inclusive. If channel is outside this range, this returns -1. Returns: the last value sent to the given D/A channel

urns: the last value sent to the given D/A channel by daSet(), or -1 if the channel number is out of range. See Also: daSet(int, int) Package Class Tree Deprecated Index Help PREV CLASS NEXT CLASS FRAMES NO FRAMES SUMMARY: INNER | FIEL
